query: I'm losing leads because I can't answer the phone while I'm mowing. Can I just put a form on my site where they book themselves?
My last app messed up my tax mapping. If I add a 'Discount' line item to a quote here, does it sync to QBO as a 'Discount' or just a negative service?
I can see labor hours, but I have no idea if I'm actually making money after material costs. Do I have to use a spreadsheet for this or can Jobber tell me my margin?
I sent an 'On My Way' text, but the client replied that the gate is locked and I never saw it. Why isn't the reply in the app?
I want my 'Mowing' jobs to be green and my 'Install' jobs to be blue on the calendar. How do I color-code by service type?
If I collect a deposit through Jobber Payments, does QBO see that as an 'Invoice' or a 'Credit Memo' until the job is done?
I need my techs to take exactly 4 photos and check a safety box before they can clock out. Can I make those fields mandatory?
I want to give my clients a 'Good/Better/Best' option on a single quote. How do I let them pick the package they want?
Does Jobber have a way to automatically text a lead back the second they submit a request from my website?
I have 40 'Sync Errors' saying my Sales Tax doesn't match. If I ignore these, will my QBO reports still be accurate?
My guys are crisscrossing town. Is there a button to 'Optimize' their route so they aren't wasting gas?
If I update my service price in Jobber, does it update my 'Products and Services' list in QuickBooks automatically?
I want to set an automation: If a quote isn't signed in 24 hours, text them. If still not signed in 48 hours, email them. Can I build that?
I'm with a client now. How do I take their credit card info through the app without a physical reader?
My techs keep forgetting to clock out. Can the app automatically clock them out when they leave the job site GPS circle?
I want to require a 50% deposit before a quote is 'Approved.' Does the client pay that through the Client Hub?
I have a big project that takes 4 days. Right now it shows as 4 separate jobs. Is there a way to link them as one big visit?
I deleted an invoice in Jobber by mistake. Why is it still sitting in my QuickBooks? Now my numbers are double-counted.
When I send a quote, do my clients have to download the Jobber app or create a password to see it? They hate doing that.
I have 60 recurring clients. Can I just store their card on file and have Jobber charge them automatically the day after the service?
I put notes about the gate code and the dog in Jobber. Where does my tech actually see those in the mobile app?
If I get a lead through my website, does it notify me via text, or do I have to keep the Jobber dashboard open all day?
Can I add my logo and change the font on my quotes, or are they all just a generic template?
My main tech is sick. How do I drag all 12 of his jobs today to another user in one go?
I want to track 'Labor Burden'—not just wages, but overhead. Can Jobber push that granular costing data into my QBO P&L?
Clients say they aren't getting my emails. Is there a log where I can prove to them that the email was sent and opened?
When a client pays an invoice with a credit card, does Jobber record the 'Processing Fee' as an expense in QBO automatically?
I want my techs to be able to upsell and create a new Quote for extra work while they are standing in the client's driveway. Is that allowed?
I'm running Facebook Ads. Can Jobber tell me which specific requests came from my ads versus my organic website traffic?
I already 'Approved' a quote, but the price of materials just went up. Can I edit the price now, or is it locked forever?
What's the difference between a 'Job' and a 'Task' on the calendar? I just want to schedule a 15-minute estimate.
I need a list of every customer who owes me money for more than 30 days. Where is the 'Aging' report?
Can my clients log in somewhere to see their own history, old photos, and past invoices without having to call me?
I have two bank accounts in QBO. How do I make sure my Jobber Payments land in 'Checking' instead of 'Savings'?
I'm working in a basement with zero cell service. If I complete the job and take photos, will the app delete them when I close it?
I have 50 quotes out. I don't have time to follow up. Can Jobber just bug them every 3 days until they sign?
I don't want my techs to see the 'Master' calendar. I only want them to see their own names. How do I hide everyone else?
My QBO uses 'Classes' for different locations. Does Jobber sync that 'Class' data, or do I have to re-tag everything in QuickBooks?
How do I set it up so every time a job is finished, the client gets a 'Thank You' email automatically?
I want the invoice to be sent the exact moment my tech hits 'Complete' on the app. Can I automate that?
Can I track my equipment (trailers/mowers) in Jobber, or is it only for tracking people?
Can I connect my 'Contact Us' button on my Facebook page directly so the lead flows into Jobber as a Request?
I want to know who opened my quote and how many times they looked at it before they signed. Does Jobber track 'Email Opens'?
I want to schedule based on 'Map View'—I want to physically see the distance between jobs before I assign them. Can I drag and drop on a map?
Does Jobber sync my gas and material 'Expense' receipts into QBO, or does it only sync 'Income' like invoices?
Can I send a 'Blast' text to all my customers at once to tell them we are closed for the fourth of July?
I want to charge a 3% 'Convenience Fee' automatically if they choose to pay by credit card. Can Jobber do that?
My tech can't 'Stop Timer' because the app says he's too far away from the job site. How do I let him bypass that?
When a client signs a quote in the Client Hub, is that a legally binding signature? Does it save their IP address?
If I use Jobber 'Job Costing,' does it break down the 'Cost of Goods Sold' (COGS) in my QBO Profit & Loss statement, or is that data stuck in Jobber?
